title: North America Clean Fuels Market Monthly Review: January 2026
content:
Key Highlights:

BC LCFS monthly trading volumes rose from 140.00K credits in November to 314.76K credits in December. In December, BC LCFS credit prices fell by 18.22% month-over-month (MoM). In December, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 55.73% compared to November. OR CFP trading activity in December witnessed a 28.12% rise. CA LCFS average monthly credit price rose by 9.16% MoM in January. Monthly credit transactions fell by 3.26% MoM in January. Canada CFR bid and offer prices for both CC2 & CC3 fell MoM in January. Both average CC3 and CC2 offer price fell by 0.62%. CC2 and CC3 average bid prices stand at 353.50 CAD & average offer prices stand at 369.38 CAD in January. Average credit prices in WA CFS rose by 19.13% MoM in December. In December, 308.31K credits were traded, recording a 245.15 MoM increase.. RIN generation increased by 6.88% MoM in December. 8.45B RINs were transacted in December, recording a 3.43% MoM increase.
author: Radhika Khandelwal
